name: Midnight Ledger
author: Bonumark
description: The bundled Bonumark Stream reference theme. Midnight Ledger is a code-free presentation theme built from metadata, settings, CSS, images, and a screenshot while Bonumark Stream core owns all application behavior.

accent.label: Accent
accent.description: Controls the restrained editorial accent color.

density.label: Density
density.description: Controls the breathing room around Midnight Ledger stream items and public panels.

content_width.label: Content width
content_width.description: Sets the public shell width for the header, stream, pages, profiles, comments, and account screens.

show_status_chip.label: Show header status
show_status_chip.description: Display Midnight Ledger's optional header status indicator.

status_label.label: Header status label
status_label.description: Short text shown inside Midnight Ledger's optional header status indicator.

show_post_count.label: Show post count
show_post_count.description: Display Midnight Ledger's optional published-post counter.

show_page_updated_date.label: Show page updated date
show_page_updated_date.description: Display the updated date under public Page titles in this theme. Off by default.

menu_label.label: Menu button label
menu_label.description: Text used for the public navigation toggle.
